name: Dijon Chicken Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cut into 32 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill to medium heat.
2. When ready to cook, spray a rack off the grill with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large pot of boiling water, blanch the potatoes for 10 minutes, then drain.
4. In a small bowl, combine honey, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, dried thyme, and black pepper.
5. Add chicken and mushrooms to the mixture; toss well to coat.
6. Thread alternating pieces of chicken, mushrooms, tomatoes, and potatoes onto 8 skewers.
7. Grill the kabobs, covered, turning occasionally, for 8 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Divide the kabobs among 4 plates and serve.
